{{CargoRelic
|name=Fake Dragon Orb
|class_id=20029
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The D. Dragon made this Dragon Orb for its regular customers. It has no summoning power and is more of a status symbol.
|fame=18
|art=15
|fth=28
|civ=11
|tech=18
|ss1=Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +4<br>Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss2=Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +8<br>Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss3=Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +12<br>Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss4=Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +12<br>Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss7=Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +12<br>Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
